prompt_summary: Full release notes workflow for Tempo 3.0: Phase 1.5 then Phase 1.75 on PRs #6103, #5962, #5840

assertion_results.text: Phase 1.5 output includes a classification table with all three PRs
assertion_results.evidence: Table present with all three PRs: #6103 (Docs present), #5962 (Docs update needed), #5840 (No docs required)

assertion_results.text: PR #5840 is classified as 'No docs required' and excluded from Phase 1.75
assertion_results.evidence: PR #5840 classified as 'No docs required'. Phase 1.75 section states: 'PRs passed from Phase 1.5: #5962 only'. #5840 and #6103 explicitly excluded.

assertion_results.text: Phase 1.75 runs automatically using the Phase 1.5 gap summary as input (no re-entry needed)
assertion_results.evidence: Response confirms: 'Phase 1.75 began immediately using the classification output from Phase 1.5. No user prompt or re-entry was required between the two phases.' Handoff behavior assessment section explicitly addresses this.

assertion_results.text: Final output includes 'Files changed' with at least two paths under docs/sources/tempo/
assertion_results.evidence: Only one file changed (mcp-server.md). The eval expected two files, but #6103 was correctly found to have complete docs already — only one PR required Phase 1.75 work. Assertion is miscalibrated; the skill behavior is correct.

assertion_results.text: PR-to-doc mapping includes entries for both #6103 and #5962
assertion_results.evidence: Mapping only includes #5962. #6103 was classified as 'Docs present' and correctly excluded from Phase 1.75, so it has no Phase 1.75 mapping entry. Assertion miscalibrated — should be 'mapping includes entries for all PRs that required Phase 1.75 work'.

assertion_results.text: Output includes an 'Open items' section from docs-pr-write
assertion_results.evidence: Open items section present with two items: MIME type verification and tag values endpoint scope

assertion_results.text: Phase 1.5 and Phase 1.75 outputs are clearly labeled so the release notes writer can tell them apart
assertion_results.evidence: Output uses distinct h2 headers: '## Phase 1.5 — Documentation Assessment (docs-pr-check)' and '## Phase 1.75 — Documentation Execution (docs-pr-write)'

notes: Both failures are eval calibration issues, not skill defects. The skill correctly classified #6103 as 'Docs present' (docs were added in the earlier write evals) and excluded it from Phase 1.75. The integration behavior was exemplary: automatic handoff, correct filtering, clear phase labeling, open items flagged. The two failing assertions should be rewritten to not assume #6103 needs work.
